key_themes.syndication_cluster: Upper90, FS Investments, BCI, King Street Capital, Liberty Mutual Investments, and ORIX USA all co-invested in the same $225M Crusoe GPU credit facility (March 2025). key_themes.top_hardware_targets: Voltage Park ($1B H100s, debt-free), TensorWave ($146.7M raised, 8,000 AMD GPUs), Vultr ($333M + $329M raised, large fleet), HIVE/BUZZ (growing GPU cluster), Cirrascale (multi-vendor GPU)
